name: Lylia

passive.name: Angry Gloom
passive.description:
Lylia gets power from Gloom, increasing her Movement Speed by 15%. Each Gloom upgrade further increases this bonus by 5%.
Gloom gains an upgrade every time he devours Shadow Energy, up to 5 times. Gloom upgrade increases the detonation damage of Shadow Energy.
passive.tips: Lylia gets power from Gloom, increasing her Movement Speed. Each time Gloom levels up, she will increase extra Movement Speed. Gloom will increase his levels by devouring Shadow Energy. Up to 5. The higher his level is, the more damage he can deal.

skill1.name: Magic Shockwave
skill1.description:
Lylia sends out Gloom with a shockwave, dealing 250 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in a line and slowing them by 30% for 1.5s.
If Gloom touches Shadow Energy, he will devour and detonate it.
skill1.tips: Lylia releases an attack wave ahead, dealing Magic Damage to enemies on the path and slowing them down. Gloom will hitch a ride on Magic Shockwave. If Gloom touches Shadow Energy, he will devour it and immediately detonate the energy.

skill2.name: Shadow Energy
skill2.description:
Lylia condenses Shadow Energy at the target location, dealing 90 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 80%.
Shadow Energy can be detonated by Gloom's devour, dealing 220 (+115% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to the enemies nearby. Each Gloom upgrade increases the detonation damage by 20%, up to 80%.
Gloom will restore 20% of Shadow Energy's Recharge Time when it hits an enemy hero.
Lylia starts with the Shadow Energy skill, storing one charge every 6s.
skill2.tips: Lylia condenses Shadow Energy to the designated area, dealing Magic Damage to enemies nearby and slowing them down. After Gloom devours Shadow Energy, he will detonate the energy and deal Magic Damage to enemies nearby. Each time Gloom upgrades himself, the damage dealt by Shadow Energy will be increased. Lylia was born to have the ability to use Shadow Energy.

ultimate.name: Black Shoes
ultimate.description: Lylia returns to the Black Shoes' location 4s ago and restores her HP and Mana to the previous state, and an extra 10% Max HP. She also gains 20% extra Movement Speed for 2s.
ultimate.tips: Lylia immediately returns to the position where the Black Shoe was 4s ago and stacks max times to use Shadow Energy, regenerating a certain amount of HP and increasing her Movement Speed.

matchupSystem.strongAgainstReason: Lylia counters Tank heroes without Blink skills, such as Carmilla and Hylos, who cannot easily escape Gloom's AOE range and are more susceptible to Lylia's high sustained damage.
matchupSystem.weakAgainstReason: Since most of Lylia's damage comes from detonating her 2nd Skill, but setting up Gloom can be quite slow, nimble Assassins like Nolan and Ling counter Lylia as she'll have a tough time hitting them.
matchupSystem.synergyReason: Lylia excels in prolonged battles, and works well with heroes with strong CC, like Franco and Minotaur.

mechanicNote: Lylia adalah mage dengan kemampuan burst/poke damage dari jarak aman.

powerCurve.description: She’s oppressive early because she starts with Shadow Energy charges and can quickly stack Gloom upgrades for high lane control, constant poke, and strong early skirmish DPS. Mid stays strong with Black Shoes enabling reckless trades, but late her damage is more zone/attrition-based and can fall off versus sustained DPS carries and long-range burst if she can’t keep enemies in her detonation area.

combos.name: LANING
combos.description: Use Lylia's 2nd Skill to hit the opponent, then use her 1st Skill to detonate the Shadow Energy for a significant burst of damage. Continue to throw her 2nd Skill at the enemy and detonate it with Gloom.

combos.name: TEAMFIGHT
combos.description: Use Lylia's 2nd Skill multiple times to cover a large area with Shadow Energy, then detonate a chain reaction with her 1st Skill. Continue to spam Lylia's 2nd Skill and detonate with Gloom to quickly set off multiple explosions at once. When in danger, use Lylia's Ultimate to return to safety and recover.
